adjudicator: Codex visual inspection using rendered PNG previews and machine gate evidence
summary: Visual review of rendered pages shows no blocking layout loss after constrained slot repair. Chart/table pages, table-body page, body paragraphs, and side navigation are readable. Warnings remain for compressed table labels and imperfect Chinese wording, but no blocking visual defect was observed in inspected pages.

dimensions.evidence: candidate previews page 01, page 03, and page 04 inspected against source-relative annual report layout
heading/body/table/sidebar hierarchy is readable and source-relative
all inspected side navigation labels share one writing mode
side labels no longer render as accidental fallback residues
grid and numeric columns preserved; constrained Chinese labels are compressed but readable
some Chinese wording is awkward, but semantic translation is present

known_warnings.evidence: grid and numeric columns preserved; constrained Chinese labels are compressed but readable
